heckintosh
Blog Writeups About

Pwnable.tw CVE-2018-1160

10 July 2022 - 2 mins read time

The following files are provided:

  • afp.conf
  • afpd
  • libatalk.so.18
  • libc-18292bd12d37bfaf58e8dded9db7f1f5da1192cb.so

The main code flow that the vulnerability lies in is depicted below:


    +-----------------------------------+               +------------------------------------------+              +-------------------------------+
    |                                   |               |                                          |              |                               |
    |       dsi_main()                  +-------1-------+                dsi_start()               +------2-------+       dsi_get_session()       +------------------+
    |                                   |               |                                          |              |                               |                  |
    +-----------------------------------+               +--+----------------+----------------------+              +-------------------------------+                  |
    |                                   |                  |                ^                                     |                               |                  |
    |                                   |                  |                +------------------7------------------+ - open a DSI session          |                  |
    | - parsing the configuration file  |                  |                                                      | - receive session msgs from   |                  |
    | | initializing the socket         |                  |                         +--------------6------------>+ TCP socket.                   |                  |
    | - initializing the dsi structure  |                  |                         |                            | - Save msg into DSI struct    |                  |
    |                                   |                  |                         |                            |                               |                  3
    +-----------------------------------+                  8                         |                            +----------------------^--------+                  |
                                                           |                         |                            |                      |                           |
                                                           |                         |                            |                      |                           |
                                                           |                         |                    DSI struct data                |                           |
                                                           |                         |                    (filled)|                      |                           |
                                                           v                         |                            |                  DSI struct with data filled     |
                                        +------------------+--------------------+    |                            5                      |                           |
                                        |                                       |    |                            |                      |                           v
            +-----------9---------------+           afp_over_dsi()              |    |           +----------------v---------------+      +--4--------+---------------+-------------+
            |                           |                                       |    |           |                                |                  |                             |
            |                           +---------------------------------------+    |           |     dsi_opensession()          |                  |    dsi_tcp_open()           |
            v                           |                                       |    |           |                                |                  |                             |
+-----------+---------------------+     | Continue to read msg under current    |    |           +--------------------------------+                  +-----------------------------+
|        dsi_stream_receive()     |     |socket.                                |    |           +-determines the processing logic|                  |                             |
|                                 |     |                                       |    |           |according to dsi->commands      |                  | - Read the DSI header from  |
+---------------------------------+     | Call different functions to handle    |    |           |                                |                  | the TCP session saved to    |
|                                 |     | different requests                    |    |           +- if dsi->commands[0]=          |                  | struct dsi->header          |
| Read new msg under current      |     |+                                      |    |           | DSIOPT_ATTNQUANT               |                  |                             |
| socket                          |      +--------------------------------------+    +-----------+                                |                  | - Read DSI payload into the |
|                                 |                                                              +--->  dsi->commands[1] = size   |                  | buffer at dsi->commands     |
| Parse msg and return            |                                                              | Everything after dsi->commands |                  |                             |
| dsi->header.dsi_command         |                                                              |[2] is copied to var attn_quantum                  +-----------------------------+
+--------+------------------------++                                                             |                                |
         |                                                                                       +- return attn_quantum to client |
         |                                                                                       |                                |
         |                            +----------------------------------------------+           +--------------------------------+
         |                            |                                              |
         |                            |  When dsi_command is DSIFUNC_CMD             |
         |                            |  dsi_commands[0] will be used as index       |
         |                            |  for afp_switch table.                       |
         +------------10--------------+                                              |
                                      |  the table element contains preauth and      |
                                      |  postauth switch                             |
                                      |                                              |
                                      |                                              |
                                      +----------------------------------------------+

Focus on the dsi_opensession() function: ` Everything after dsi->commands[2] is copied to var attn_quantum. `

with by heckintosh
